title: hotato trial manifest, schema_version 1
description: An immutable pin created BEFORE a before/after experiment. Before and after runs must reference the same manifest_hash; a changed policy, scorer, label, onset, or fixture universe refuses the comparison. fix trial ignores stored verdicts and recomputes both sides under this manifest.

nonce.description: Random per-trial nonce (supplied by the caller; the kernel never invents randomness).

config_hash.description: sha256 over the canonical ScoreConfig + VADParams.

fixtures.description: The COMPLETE expected fixture universe. Before and after must each cover exactly this set; a missing or extra fixture refuses the comparison.

stimulus_pcm_sha256.description: Pinned caller-side (scripted stimulus) decoded-PCM hash from the battery; a fresh recapture that replays the same stimulus matches it. A mismatch with no capture receipt cannot certify machine-verified pairing.

manifest_hash.description: sha256 over the canonical manifest body (all fields except manifest_hash and signature).
